question.title: Will an IAEA Iran report mention new centrifuge cascade installation at Natanz or Fordow before May 1, 2026?
question.description:
New cascade installation is a material escalation signal in Iran’s enrichment capability.

`{"format":"bot_tournament_question","info":{"hash_id":"669d023dd07ce003","sheet_id":294.0}}`
question.resolution_criteria: This question resolves to yes if the IAEA publishes an official Iran safeguards or verification report on or after February 17, 2026 and before May 1, 2026 that states that new centrifuge cascade(s) were installed at Natanz or Fordow. This question resolves to no otherwise. The primary source is the IAEA Iran topic page and linked reports at https://www.iaea.org/topics/iran
question.fine_print: “Installed” must be stated in the report text; plans or intentions do not count. Reports include Board of Governors reports or other official IAEA publications linked from the Iran topic page. If the primary page does not host the relevant report by May 1, 2026, resolve using the IAEA document as published elsewhere on iaea.org, and if needed resolve disputes using credible sources per https://www.metaculus.com/faq/#definitions. Candidate Sources: IAEA publications search https://www.iaea.org/search?search_api_fulltext=Iran%20verification
